month_specific_notes.April: Good shoulder-season travel window. Confirm public holiday closures before departure.
month_specific_notes.July: Peak summer conditions in many regions. Carry heat protection and confirm attraction timings.
month_specific_notes.August: High travel demand month. Apply early and reconfirm hotel/transfer availability.
month_specific_notes.September: Good post-summer travel period with smoother appointment availability in many markets.
month_specific_notes.December: Peak festive season. Expect longer processing and higher air/hotel demand.
